Appearances on MAR-06-2013:
Plaintiff SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL, LLC is represented by Maria Rios who is present with Attorney Howard Olsen
Defendant JUSTINE BARAJAS is present with Attorney Michael Hamilton representing the defendant through limited scope

Judge Pro Tem Olan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 504A for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The settlement agreement is filed. The trial date of MAR-11-2013 is vacated.
